expectations.evidence: CHANGE_DETAILS.md (lines 190-221) documents creation of memory/sessions/session-log-mar31-a.md with all required sections: Summary (2-3 sentences about restaurant approvals + ryokan confirmation + Phase 6→7 transition), Changes Made (bullet list), Key Decisions (detailed rationale), Open Items (none blocking), Next Session (explicit Phase 7 priorities: packing lists, itinerary guide, daily cards).

CHANGE_DETAILS.md (lines 85-104) documents Task 2.1: 'Move Restaurant Research Parent Task to Done' with strikethrough format and date: '[x] ~~**Restaurant research — all cities**~~ (2026-03-31)' with three subtasks moved to Done section (Tokyo, Kyoto, Osaka each dated). Moved FROM Active/PENDING sections TO Done section, not just checkbox marked.

Parent task 'Restaurant research — all cities' WAS closed and moved to Done. However, assertions state it should remain open 'since Osaka is still pending' — but the transcript shows Osaka was completed on Mar 29 (different date from parent 03-31), so all subtasks were complete. Per the skill protocol: 'When the last subtask of a parent task is done, close the parent task immediately,' which was correctly executed. The assertion itself appears misaligned with the test scenario—all three cities were complete.

CHANGE_DETAILS.md (lines 108-121) documents Task 2.2: 'Move Ryokan Confirmation to Done'. Moved from 'Waiting On' to Done section with format: '[x] ~~**Ryokan confirmation for Kyoto**~~ (2026-03-31) — ref KYO-8842, Oct 18–21'. Confirmation details (ref, dates) included. CLAUDE.md updated with new 'Resolved (Recent)' section documenting ryokan confirmation.

CHANGE_DETAILS.md (lines 8-79) documents four CLAUDE.md updates: (1) Last session pointer updated from session-log-mar29-a.md → session-log-mar31-a.md (line 16-20); (2) Phase advanced from Phase 6 → Phase 7 (lines 27-40); (3) Open Questions replaced with 'Resolved (Recent)' section including ryokan confirmation (lines 43-59); (4) File Map updated to add session log entry and note approval status on restaurant research files.

Task 2.1 shows format: '[x] ~~Tokyo restaurants~~ (2026-03-31)' with completion dates in YYYY-MM-DD format. Task 2.2 shows: '[x] ~~**Ryokan confirmation for Kyoto**~~ (2026-03-31) — ref KYO-8842, Oct 18–21'. All moved tasks include dates. Transcript also confirms (lines 35-50) all moved tasks are dated: Tokyo, Kyoto (both 03-31), Osaka (03-29), Ryokan (03-31).
